description: Model a real estate investment property in Portfolio Performance using the currently open portfolio (350,000 EUR cash balance). Create a security named 'Oak Street Rental Property' in EUR and record a purchase of 1 share for 285,000 EUR on 2024-01-15. Document six monthly rental income payments as dividends of 1,200 EUR each, occurring on the first of every month from February 2024 through July 2024. Update the property's historical value with entries of 288,000 EUR on 2024-03-31 and 291,500 EUR on 2024-06-30. Save the portfolio.
